note: Period C hung at window 8/8 (3400/3626 features). Systematic bug: last ~200 features block on network call. Results for A and B are complete. Period C was 7/8 windows complete when it hung.

2x_costs.status: NOT_RUN - script hung before reaching this test

known_bug.description: Feature builder hangs on last ~200 samples when window end date approaches recent dates
known_bug.cause: Likely blocking network call (yfinance or similar) for recent data with no timeout
known_bug.affected_windows: Last window of any period ending near present (2025-12-31)
known_bug.workaround: Need to add timeout to data fetching or cache recent data
